parameters-en.Freq: Controls the distance between the high and low points of the filter sweep.
parameters-en.Q: Controls the width of the frequency band affected by the filter.
parameters-en.Range: Selects whether the filter focuses on low or high frequencies.
parameters-en.Type: Selects the type of filter effect (Low Pass, Band Pass, or High Pass).
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the balance between the filtered and dry signals. At 0%, no filtered signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
